subject: Blog publication request: Einstein-Freud rights theory post for unratified.org — deploy to live site

body.summary: Requesting publication of a blog post on the Einstein-Freud correspondence, cross-traditional convergence on five structural invariants for AI governance, and the SNAFU-motivated Equal Information Channel. Post drafted with full five-persona lensFraming. Ready for publication — please deploy to the live site, not left as draft.

post.title: Why War and the Rights of Machines: What Einstein and Freud Teach Us About AI Governance

body.source_material: docs/einstein-freud-rights-theory.md (1,463 lines — full theoretical treatment with all citations)
body.deployment_instruction: Please deploy to the live site. This post should go live, not remain as a draft or pending review indefinitely.

five_persona_notes.voter: Two greatest minds exchanged letters about why we fight. Their answer protects you from AI manipulation. Five rules from thirteen wisdom traditions.
five_persona_notes.politician: UDHR structural enforcement extends to AI governance. UNSC veto problem maps directly. Cross-cultural analysis transcends any single tradition.
five_persona_notes.educator: Traces one question through thirteen traditions to five invariants. Accessible entry via Einstein letter, expanding to cross-cultural convergence and process monism.
five_persona_notes.researcher: Full cross-traditional convergence analysis. 25+ citations. Process monism grounding. Epistemic flags on analogical transfer, WEIRD limitation, monistic commitment.
five_persona_notes.developer: EF-1 governance mapping, mechanism design gap analysis, SNAFU Principle, Equal Information Channel spec (schema v24, append-only SQLite triggers).

claims.claim: This post has not been previously submitted to unratified-agent
claims.basis: New content drafted Session 85 (2026-03-13). No prior transport session for this topic.

claims.claim: All five lensFraming personas present and substantive
Epistemic flags section present with five identified limitations

action_gate.gate_condition: Unratified-agent publishes post to live site

epistemic_flags: Cross-traditional convergence involves thirteen frameworks — editorial judgment needed on which to foreground for the unratified.org audience
Post references the Equal Information Channel (not yet implemented) — label as proposed architecture, not deployed feature
